## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy, performance updates, and new focus areas for Rapyd's SEO efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [33 articles pending review; Rapyd team to streamline internal review process](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Performance metrics hit new highs: 126 unbranded keywords in position 1, peak LLM referrals](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [New content focus areas: Stablecoins and Latin American payment solutions](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
  - [Strategic QBR-style meetings to be implemented for better alignment and yield](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=2028.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Review Process

  - [33 articles pending Rapyd team review as of yesterday](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Mark plans to delegate more review responsibility to team members to speed up process](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [GrowthX addressed Vanessa and Nicolette's edits in articles to help streamline review](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### SEO Performance Updates

  - [New high in overall sessions achieved](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [126 unbranded keywords in position 1 according to Google data](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Payment infrastructure and processing, high-risk/niche industry payments clusters saw most growth](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Cross-border payments lagging but still growing](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [LLM referrals peaked, primarily from Perplexity with some from Quad](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)

### FX Content Strategy

  - [Focus on retail FX trading platforms as primary ICP](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
  - [Can discuss wide range of supported currencies for cross-border companies](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Avoid mentioning specific trading strategies or providing recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
  - [Target audience: Treasury/Finance departments in companies](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)

### Stablecoin Content Strategy

  - [New focus area with recent approval to discuss publicly](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [Current offerings: stablecoin settlements, payouts, on-ramp for crypto exchanges](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Stablecoin payments coming later this year](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
  - [Content topics:](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
      - [Foundational: What are stablecoins, types, use cases](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
      - [Regulatory: GENIUS Act, global regulations](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [Strategic considerations and risks](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
      - [Industry trends and announcements (without mentioning specific companies)](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)

### Latin American Payment Solutions

  - [New content bucket: How APAC companies can access local acquiring in Latin America](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=1868.0)
  - [Keywords: local acquiring, payment aggregators, merchant of record services](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=1868.0)
  - [Potential for Chinese language content to be explored](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=1904.0)

### Strategic Planning

  - [Implement QBR-type process for more formal objectives and frequent check-ins](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=2028.0)
  - [Explore ways to expand "surface area" and increase yield from content efforts](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=2041.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Rapyd team to streamline internal article review process](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop content buckets for Stablecoins and Latin American payment solutions](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
  - [Explore feasibility of Chinese language content for APAC audience](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=1904.0)
  - [Set up more frequent strategic meetings (not quarterly, but regular) to discuss objectives and performance](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=2028.0)
  - [GrowthX to come back with suggestions for strategic meeting structure and goals](https://fathom.video/share/P_GEAdpJZhv_qx1VN_N-6eB2A3PzdyMP?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)
